name: @spier/cds-hooks
description: SPiER on Cloudflare Workers — one Worker serving the adoption-guide SPA (Static Assets) and the CDS Hooks 2.0 API, sharing the app's browser-free derivation code.

scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run stage:assets && npm run build:worker
scripts.dev: npm run build:web && npm run stage:assets && npm run build:worker && wrangler dev
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run test
